artifacts.sourceTitle: Cadre general de l'Universite Grenoble Alpes concernant l'apport et les usages recommandes de l'intelligence artificielle pour conduire et realiser ses missions

artifacts.claimText: UGA's AI reference framework says use of tools mobilizing AI is prohibited by principle for knowledge assessment unless explicitly authorized, with study regulations and assessment modalities specifying the AI-use framework.
artifacts.normalizedValue: AI tools prohibited by default in assessment unless explicitly authorized

artifacts.sourceTitle: Cadre general de l'Universite Grenoble Alpes concernant l'apport et les usages recommandes de l'intelligence artificielle pour conduire et realiser ses missions
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Controle des connaissances : Le recours a des outils mobilisant l'IA est interdit par principe sauf si son utilisation est explicitement autorisee. Les reglements des etudes et modalites de controles de connaissance precisent le cadre de l'utilisation de l'IA.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: For knowledge assessment, AI tools are prohibited by default unless explicitly authorized; study regulations and assessment modalities define the framework.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: Section II.2, Utilisation de l'IA dans l'enseignement
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: Cadre general de l'Universite Grenoble Alpes concernant l'apport et les usages recommandes de l'intelligence artificielle pour conduire et realiser ses missions
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.notes: Approved as a narrow assessment claim directly supported by Section II.2 of the official UGA AI reference framework.

artifacts.claimText: Outside knowledge assessment, UGA's AI reference framework leaves AI-use instructions to the teacher and teaching team, while stating that an AI tool must not substitute for the student's exercise of the skills used in the assignment.
artifacts.normalizedValue: Instructor or teaching team defines AI-use instructions outside assessment

citation.citationTitle: Cadre general de l'Universite Grenoble Alpes concernant l'apport et les usages recommandes de l'intelligence artificielle pour conduire et realiser ses missions

artifacts.sourceTitle: Cadre general de l'Universite Grenoble Alpes concernant l'apport et les usages recommandes de l'intelligence artificielle pour conduire et realiser ses missions
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: En dehors du controle de connaissances, il revient a l'enseignant et a l'equipe pedagogique de definir les consignes d'usage de l'IA. Un outil d'IA ne saurait se substituer a l'etudiant pour mettre en oeuvre les competences mobilisees dans un exercice donne.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Outside assessment, the teacher and teaching team define AI-use instructions; AI must not substitute for the student's exercise of assignment skills.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: Section II.3, Choix pedagogique, equite et inclusivite

artifacts.claimText: UGA's AI reference framework says students using generative AI must mention the use of generative AI and its name, identify the parts generated by or with AI, and cite sources correctly to avoid plagiarism.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Cadre general de l'Universite Grenoble Alpes concernant l'apport et les usages recommandes de l'intelligence artificielle pour conduire et realiser ses missions
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Avant toute transmission de donnees personnelles, s'assurer que les obligations en matiere de protection des donnees personnelles (RGPD) et les regles europeennes soient respectees. Les memes precautions s'appliquent en matiere de donnees professionnelles. Toute transmission de donnees professionnelle doit etre approuvee par l'etablissement apres analyse.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Before transmitting personal data, GDPR and European rules must be respected; professional-data transmission requires institutional approval after analysis.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Cadre general de l'Universite Grenoble Alpes concernant l'apport et les usages recommandes de l'intelligence artificielle pour conduire et realiser ses missions
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: En cas d'usage des outils de l'IA generative, ils doivent verifier si les idees generees par ces derniers proviennent de sources existantes et ajouter les references appropriees le cas echeant. Les chercheurs et chercheuses sont tenus de mentionner le recours a une IA generative, ainsi que le nom de cette derniere, et d'identifier les parties generees par l'IA ou avec l'aide de l'IA.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: For generative AI use, researchers must verify generated ideas against existing sources, add references where appropriate, disclose the tool, and identify AI-generated or AI-assisted parts.

artifacts.title: Universite Grenoble Alpes AI Reference Framework Staging Notes
artifacts.summary: Staged claims for Universite Grenoble Alpes rely on the official UGA AI reference framework PDF. Claims cover assessment default rules, teaching-team instructions outside assessment, student generative AI disclosure, data-protection handling, and research attribution/protection guidance.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
This staged run used one official UGA AI framework PDF as the claim source; official news/commentary content was rejected as non-policy evidence.
No login-gated intranet pages were accessed.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
